items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Follow-up appointment scheduling' requirement. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that a follow-up appointment has been scheduled or completed. The linked use case mentions the need for follow-up appointment scheduling but does not provide any evidence of its execution or confirmation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
